# OpenCTI Phase 1 fixtures

`cases.json` pairs each original synthetic source, candidate object list, and expected compatibility
codes in one immutable registry. It contains English, Arabic, and mixed-language examples across
19 compatibility, evidence, dependency, marking, and relationship categories. All content was
created for this project under Apache-2.0; no operational intelligence or proprietary corpus is
included. The registry records the exact OpenCTI, PyCTI, and connectors pins used for the profile.
